title: ABSINA button batteries mixed 24 pack Alkaline & Lithium - 2x AG1 / 2x AG3 / 4x AG4 / 4x AG10 / 4x AG13 / 2x CR2016 / 2x CR2025 / 4x CR2032-1.5V & 3V watch batteries assorted sizes - watch battery
features: ASSORTED WATCH BATTERIES SET with exceptional longevity, reliable performance & maximum capacity includes the most common lithium & alkaline coin cells
IDEAL FOR car keys, garage door openers, TAN generators, scales, watches, children's toys, calculators, remote controls, pedometers, key lights, LED tea lights, calipers and much more
USE - With temperature resistance from -10°C to +50°C, the button battery is ideally suited for various applications under extreme conditions
STORAGE CAPABLE - The ABSINA small watch batteries have a shelf life of up to 5 years, allowing the coin batteries to be easily used at a later date without any problems
DELIVERY includes button cell batteries assorted 2x AG1 / 2x AG3 / 4x AG4 / 4x AG10 / 4x AG13 / 2x CR2016 / 2x CR2025 / 4x CR2032 - 1.5 Volt Alkaline & 3 Volt Lithium Batteries
